required_preferences.fact: Prioritizes vegetarian meals featuring iron-rich foods and regularly incorporates fortified products or select eggs into his diet; avoids low-iron vegetarian options even during busy weeks

supersedes.fact: Eats freshly cooked vegetarian meals whenever possible — only resorts to frozen dinners during high-stress grading weeks

required_preferences.fact: Coordinates writing workshop sessions in mixed-level groups for incoming freshmen, replacing regular small-group ESL tutoring with broader participation

supersedes.fact: Organizes group tutoring sessions for ESL students instead of one-on-one meetings to foster peer connections

required_preferences.fact: Incorporates short, low-impact mobility and balance exercises into his morning routine to maintain energy while recovering from his foot injury
Schedules solo weekend brunch outings at local cafés to compensate for frequent partner absences, choosing venues with relaxed atmospheres over crowded hotspots
Maintains monthly video calls with his sister, never resorts to text-only catch-ups
Now runs brief, open Q&A sessions after each class to compensate for eliminated tutoring hours, making support immediately accessible to mixed-level students

persona: A community college instructor teaching academic writing skills
